emails.subject: #512924 and 512929
emails.body: #512924 and 512929 These two deals do not have contacts but are coded to be confirmed. Can you check and see if she does want them to be confirmed and if so, please add contacts. We are still planning on confirming the daily deals in the west, but we have run into system problems so we have pushed the start date back a little. I'll let you know when we have a definite date. Thanks!
